log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vedalken — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vedalken — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 47/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 36 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 11/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician --- HP: 11/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (11/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Vedalken — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: -8/67

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
